title: mentha × ivesii
intro: Mentha × ivesii, commonly known as ginger mint, is a hybrid species of mint plant, resulting from the cross between watermint (Mentha aquatica) and peppermint (Mentha × piperita). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help alleviate digestive issues and soothe skin irritations. The health benefits of ginger mint include relief from nausea and stomach discomfort, as well as its ability to aid in respiratory issues such as congestion and coughs. Ginger mint can be prepared as a tea, added to salads, or used as a garnish, making it a versatile and useful herb for various applications.
